11.anchor: But Nineveh has more than 120,000 people living in spiritual darkness,
11.note: Hebrew people who don’t know their right hand from their left.

2.anchor: I called to you from the land of the dead,

3.anchor: ’s command and went to Nineveh, a city so large that it took three days to see it all.
3.note: Hebrew a great city to God, of three days’ journey.
